caption: An older man with gray hair and glasses is seen speaking into a black microphone. He is dressed in a light blue, patterned garment and wears a beaded necklace. He is positioned in front of a background of horizontal brown blinds. The man is captured from the chest up, with the microphone extending into the frame from the right. In the lower right area of each shot, a white rectangular box containing the word "ORCA" in black capital letters is visible. Across the sequence, the man's facial expressions shift slightly as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing and his gaze shifting downward and then forward. The camera remains stationary throughout the clip, maintaining a steady medium close-up shot of the man as he continues to address an unseen audience.
